case_title: WILSON RENE BARRIOS MORALES VS. MAILE DAVIS BRIAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-06-2024 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WILSON RENE BARRIOS MORALES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS MAILE DAVIS BRIAN AND OFA K. LOLOHEA ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRIOS MORALES, WILSON RENE AS TO DEFENDANT LOLOHEA, OFA K (VEHICLE REGISTERED OWNER)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WILSON RENE BARRIOS MORALES IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS MAILE DAVIS BRIAN AND OFA K. LOLOHEA ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CAROLYN GOLD; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY BARRIOS MORALES, WILSON RENE AS TO DEFENDANT BRIAN, MAILE DAVIS (DRIVER) LOLOHEA, OFA K (VEHICLE REGISTERED OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
